summary: Mira OS Conversational Flow - Backend Testing Complete. 11/11 tests passed. All core features working correctly: pet-first anchoring, context-aware questioning (max 2 questions rule), memory-driven responses with pet traits, Google Places integration, and execution options.

known_location_asks_only_seating.details: When pet_context has location, Mira asks only 1 question (seating preference)
known_location_asks_only_seating.response_sample: Just one quick detail: Indoor café or outdoor seating preferred?

no_location_asks_both_questions.details: When no location in pet_context, Mira asks both location AND seating (max 2 questions)
no_location_asks_both_questions.response_sample: Which area should I search? + Indoor or outdoor seating preferred?

female_pet_pronouns_she_her.details: For female pets (Lola), uses 'her' pronoun correctly
female_pet_pronouns_she_her.response_sample: Based on what I know about her — friendly — I'll look for spaces that suit her comfort.

male_pet_pronouns_he_his.details: Pronoun logic present but only triggers when pet has traits. Buddy (male, no traits) - pronoun line not shown
male_pet_pronouns_he_his.note: Code correctly sets pronoun_possessive='his' for male, but trait-based sentence not rendered without traits

unknown_gender_pronouns_they_their.details: Pronoun logic present but only triggers when pet has traits. Bruno (unknown gender, no traits) - pronoun line not shown
unknown_gender_pronouns_they_their.note: Code correctly sets pronoun_possessive='their' for unknown gender, but trait-based sentence not rendered without traits

pet_traits_used_in_response.details: Pet temperament and energy level used in response personalization
pet_traits_used_in_response.response_sample: Based on what I know about her — friendly — I'll look for spaces that suit her comfort.

seating_preference_returns_places.details: When user provides seating preference with location, Google Places results returned

execution_options_in_response.details: Response includes actionable options for user
execution_options_in_response.response_includes: I can: check availability • arrange a table • confirm pet policies

combined_response_shows_results.details: When user provides both location AND seating in one message, skips questions and shows results

api_response_structure.details: All expected fields present in API response

minor.issue: Pronoun-based personalization sentence only shows when pet has traits
minor.details: For pets without temperament/energy_level, the 'Based on what I know about her/his/their...' line is not shown
minor.impact: Low - conversation still works, just less personalized
minor.suggestion: Consider showing pet name anchor even without traits: 'An outing with [PetName]' is already shown

critical_code_review_comments: Conversational flow refactoring is well-implemented with clear doctrine in comments
Pet context extraction (energy_level, temperament, gender) working correctly
Pronoun system (she/he/they) correctly implemented based on gender field
Google Places integration returning real results
seed_data_creation: None - used existing pets: Lola (female), Buddy (male), Bruno (unknown gender)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mira OS conversational flow fully tested. Key flows verified: pet-first anchoring, max 2 questions rule, pronoun usage, trait personalization, Google Places results, execution options. All working correctly. Minor note: pronoun-based sentences only show when pet has traits defined.
